_source: Merged catalog approximating a typical Cursor/Codex CLI setup with five MCP servers. Tool names and descriptions are taken verbatim from the public README files of github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers (postgres, filesystem, github, slack subdirectories, as of June 2026). Used here only to verify intent-tag inference on real published tool names; the proxy's behavior is name-driven, so the schema bodies are sized representatively but omit verbose JSON-schema detail.

tools.name: postgres__query
tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query against the configured Postgres database.

sql.description: The SQL query to execute. Read-only.

tools.name: postgres__list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the connected Postgres database.

tools.name: filesystem__read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the filesystem.

tools.name: filesystem__write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or overwrite an existing file with new content.

tools.name: filesystem__list_directory
tools.description: List the contents of a directory.

tools.name: filesystem__create_directory
tools.description: Create a new directory, including any necessary parents.

tools.name: filesystem__search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files matching a pattern within a directory.

tools.name: github__create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository.

tools.name: github__list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a GitHub repository, optionally filtered by state and labels.

tools.name: github__search_code
tools.description: Search for code across GitHub repositories.

tools.name: github__create_pull_request
tools.description: Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository.

tools.name: slack__post_message
tools.description: Post a message to a Slack channel.

tools.name: slack__list_channels
tools.description: List channels in the Slack workspace.

tools.name: linear__create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in Linear.

tools.name: linear__update_issue
tools.description: Update fields on a Linear issue.

tools.name: ambiguous_tool_xyz
tools.description: An MCP tool whose name carries no recognized verb token, used to verify fail-safe-to-include behavior of the verb classifier.
